title: Harpy Squeal
wikitext:
[]: Harpy Squeal             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Sat Dec 25, 2010 5:32 pm When Asuka threw the second-to-last on the last one, and when she took out the first, the things squealed. ??? Sounded like "Ya-nya?!" So they have a...tight larynx with a high-pitched voice?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 25, 2010 6:47 pm They make a lot of strange, not-very-Eva-like sounds. Not all of them high-pitched.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Sat Dec 25, 2010 6:52 pm Er, but that particular scene where it gets hit with the body of its dead comrade (insert communist joke here) was particularly strange, since it sounded surprised to see Asuka kicking their asses, way after she'd slaughtered all it companions. It was a tad retarded; very retarded.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Wed Dec 29, 2010 11:24 pm Those MPEs were pathetic copies of the real thing. The only reason they won was because of their S2 organs and fake Lances, and because there were so many of them. The fact they were beaten by a 14-year-old girl who JUST got out of a coma and the soul of her crazed dead mother is proof of how poorly they were built, regardless of the outcome. If those things had no S2 organs Asuka would have made mince-meat out of them and they would have STAYED that way. Remember, Asuka slaughtered the whole JSSDF and 9 fully powered Evas in about five minutes flat. If you were watching that in person you would most definitely say she won. Not really responding to anybody in particular here, just had to let off a little bit of steam.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Thu Dec 30, 2010 9:23 am what does that have to do with their voices?

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Thu Dec 30, 2010 9:56 am Nothing. I was drunk off my ass.

[]:             Quote Post by xuefranklin » Tue Jan 04, 2011 5:49 am I thought that it sounded like a duck

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jan 04, 2011 6:50 am i couldn't tell shit. it sounded a cross between a pig, human, and an indeterminate water fowl

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Jan 04, 2011 1:21 pm It was the sound a cow makes when it gets hit by a truck.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Tue Jan 04, 2011 1:31 pm yeah their sounds always reminded me of cows. truly some to the core hitting creepy sounds they make.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jan 04, 2011 3:33 pm cows? harpies? ???

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Sat Jan 15, 2011 12:59 pm Cowpies.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sun Jan 16, 2011 12:01 am Tankred wrote: Cowpies.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Sun Jan 16, 2011 2:35 pm Well I remember one of their heads going squish.

[]:             Quote Post by The_Red_Soryu » Sat Feb 05, 2011 2:24 am that's what i call "extreme cow tipping".
